title: ammi divaricatum
intro: Ammi divaricatum, also known as Ajwain or Divya Phool, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and India. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and carminative effects. The health benefits of Ammi divaricatum include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Ammi divaricatum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
